name: Prompt-7 SL wiring verdict
what_it_solves: Verdict report on whether the SL engine is wired correctly end-to-end (prompt 7 in the gap-exploit suite).
how_it_solves: Traces a real request through orchestrator → SL engine → fuser → tier → response and grades each hop.
why_it_exists: Answers 'is the pipeline actually wired the way the roadmap claims?' — one report per prompt keeps the answer surgical.
